results.title: Blastable: AI Powered Email Marketing Software | Product Hunt
results.content:
@cam\_walker thanks for the support!

Ica Lestari

Congratulations on launching Blastable! Optimizing email deliverability is crucial for engagement. How does your AI determine the best timing for sending emails, and what factors does it consider to ensure maximum impact on recipient engagement?

Justin Michie
Blastable

Blastable

@ica\_lestari I can't expain the exact details as it's proprietary to us, but in a nutshell, we learn based past email blasts and send emails in the way they are most likely to get the best deliverability - so the more you mail, the better your results should be. [...] Email has one of the best returns on investment of any marketing medium - $42 ROI for every dollar spent and with this launch and discount, your ROI will be even better. There are a lot more crazy stats at that link and tons of other reasons why you should be sending more emails.   
  
We love to help customers send email and ultimately make more money... email is all we do and our team is here to help you in every way we can. You can contact us anytime by email or live chat at:   
  
See ya!  
  
Justin [...] Hey, hey!  
  
Justin Michie here... CEO and founder of Blastable!  
  
I’ve been doing online marketing and things since 2003. That sorta makes me an OG :)  
  
Back in the day, I was sending so many emails my internet service provider thought I was a spammer and temporarily shut down my internet connection.  
  
I also wrote one of the first books on Internet Marketing (Street Smart Internet Marketing) which ended up being used as a textbook by a bunch of Colleges and Universities.    
  
One of my dreams was to retire before I turned 40, which I could have pulled off (my businesses have done over 9 figures in online sales combined), but instead I did something crazy and decided to start my ultimate dream business: Blastable

## Migma AILaunches

Migma AI

Migma AIMake emails sexy again

Launched on February 11th, 2026

Migma AI

Migma AILovable for Email [...] You have to get good at your prompts and making multiple edits/adjustments in a singular prompt. Each modification to an email you make, creates a new version of that email. The memberships tiers are based on number of daily emails. If you aren't efficient with your prompts and edits, you can burn through your daily allotment and have to pick it back up the next day. Example: "Change the color on this word to Blue" then a separate prompt "Ok change the layout of the text and image and put the image on the left of the text" - this would be 2 emails. Versus " Change the color on this word to blue and move the image in section 3 to the left of the text" - This would be one email. [...] I'm a non-technical founder who knows the importance of email for my product-based business. I don't have the technical skills to efficiently build large campaigns. There's so much more to emails that I never realized, beyond just making it look nice. Migma has just blown this out of the water for me. Prompt to fully built email in seconds. Thats all I thought I needed, but there is so much more. They have their "email preflight" checker to make sure it's compatible with all the email servers (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, et cetera), checks all my links, makes sure there are no code errors, et cetera. If there are errors, all you need to do is click the "fix with AI" button. Poof. All better.

4.8

Based on 12 reviews

Review Mailmodo?

Reviewers largely praise Mailmodo for making interactive AMP emails practical, with repeated mentions of an intuitive drag-and-drop editor, a visual journey builder, and emails that let people complete forms or actions inside the inbox. Users say it helps blend design and usability well, and one non-technical reviewer said setup felt easy with helpful support, especially around deliverability. The main caveat is consistency: at least one user said inbox placement and delivery rates were uneven, suggesting the interactive approach is compelling but may not work smoothly for every team.

results.title: Nitrosend: Email for AI agents. They sign up, send and reply.
results.content:
Report

George H.

Nitrosend

Nitrosend

Maker

@hazy0 right question to ask, deliverability is the bit we're most paranoid about (third email company, we've been burned before). Nothing sends until SPF, DKIM and DMARC verify on the domain, sending is quota'd so a fresh domain can't blast at volume on day one, and bounce and complaint monitoring runs on every send. The agent gets the same guardrails a good human sender would, it just actually follows them.

Report

Priya K

Congrats @gthartley for the launch 🙌 love the target audience lookalike concept for outbound, qq how do you handle privacy and security for AI-managed conversations?

Nitrosend is full-stack email built for AI agents. Point any agent at nitrosend.com/SKILL.md and it signs itself up, onboards, connects your domain and sends. Live today: marketing and transactional email, real inboxes for agents on your own domain (beta, by request), and 1-1 customer replies with human escalation. Coming soon: personalised outreach run by your agent. In development: goal-based agentic marketing. Humans approve. Agents operate.

📌

Hey Product Hunt, George here 👋🏻

Nitrosend came out of running Obooko (producthunt.com/products/obooko, #2 Product of the Day here in February). Running a free ebook platform with 840,000 readers on its list, entirely through an AI agent, convinced me the dashboard era of email is done. It's also my third email company: SmartrMail (acquired 2022) and Sendicate before it, with six billion emails sent between them.
